sentences.target: Je ne retrouve pas mon oreiller ce matin.
sentences.reading: /ʒə nə ʁə.tʁuv pa mɔ̃ ɔ.ʁe.je sə ma.tɛ̃/

translations.fr: Je ne retrouve pas mon oreiller ce matin.
translations.ipa: /ʒə nə ʁə.tʁuv pa mɔ̃ ɔ.ʁe.je sə ma.tɛ̃/
translations.en: I can't find my pillow this morning.
translations.es: No encuentro mi almohada esta mañana.
translations.de: Ich finde heute Morgen mein Kopfkissen nicht.
translations.it: Non trovo il mio cuscino stamattina.
translations.ko: 오늘 아침에 내 베개를 못 찾겠어.
translations.zh-Hans: 我今天早上找不到我的枕头。
translations.yue: 我今朝搵唔到我個枕頭。
translations.ru: Я сегодня утром не могу найти свою подушку.
translations.pt: Não encontro meu travesseiro esta manhã.
translations.he: אני לא מוצא את הכרית שלי הבוקר.
translations.vi: Sáng nay tôi không tìm thấy cái gối của mình.
translations.nl: Ik kan vanmorgen mijn kussen niet vinden.
translations.uk: Я сьогодні вранці не можу знайти свою подушку.
translations.hu: Ma reggel nem találom a párnámat.
translations.hi: आज सुबह मुझे अपना तकिया नहीं मिल रहा है।
translations.pl: Dziś rano nie mogę znaleźć swojej poduszki.
translations.el: Δεν μπορώ να βρω το μαξιλάρι μου σήμερα το πρωί.
translations.nb: Jeg finner ikke puten min i dag tidlig.
translations.id: Pagi ini aku tidak bisa menemukan bantalku.
translations.sv: Jag kan inte hitta min kudde nu på morgonen.
translations.ro: Nu îmi găsesc perna în această dimineață.
translations.cs: Dnes ráno nemůžu najít svůj polštář.
translations.da: Jeg kan ikke finde min pude her til morgen.
translations.ja: 今朝は枕が見つからない。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular.
Negation particle; first element of the discontinuous negation ne ... pas.
Main verb, present indicative (1st person singular).
Negation adverb completing ne ... pas.
Possessive determiner, masculine singular, agrees with oreiller.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of retrouve.
Demonstrative determiner modifying matin.
Common noun, masculine singular; forms a time expression (ce matin).

sentences.target: Ton oreiller est trop dur pour moi.
sentences.reading: /tɔ̃ ɔ.ʁe.je ɛ tʁo dyʁ puʁ mwa/

translations.fr: Ton oreiller est trop dur pour moi.
translations.ipa: /tɔ̃ ɔ.ʁe.je ɛ tʁo dyʁ puʁ mwa/
translations.en: Your pillow is too hard for me.
translations.es: Tu almohada es demasiado dura para mí.
translations.de: Dein Kopfkissen ist zu hart für mich.
translations.it: Il tuo cuscino è troppo duro per me.
translations.zh-Hans: 你的枕头对我来说太硬了。
translations.yue: 你個枕頭對我嚟講太硬喇。
translations.ru: Твоя подушка для меня слишком жёсткая.
translations.pt: Seu travesseiro é duro demais para mim.
translations.vi: Gối của bạn quá cứng đối với tôi.
translations.nl: Jouw kussen is te hard voor mij.
translations.uk: Твоя подушка для мене надто тверда.
translations.hi: तुम्हारा तकिया मेरे लिए बहुत कठोर है।
translations.pl: Twoja poduszka jest dla mnie za twarda.
translations.el: Το μαξιλάρι σου είναι πολύ σκληρό για εμένα.
translations.nb: Puten din er for hard for meg.
translations.sv: Din kudde är för hård för mig.
translations.ro: Perna ta este prea tare pentru mine.
translations.cs: Tvůj polštář je na mě moc tvrdý.
translations.da: Din pude er for hård for mig.
translations.ja: あなたの枕は私には硬すぎます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular, masculine singular.
Common noun, masculine singular; subject of the copular clause.
Copular auxiliary (3rd person singular present) linking subject to predicate.
Degree adverb intensifying the adjective dur.
Adjective, masculine singular; predicative complement after être.
Preposition introducing the complement pour moi.
Stressed personal pronoun; object of the preposition pour.

translations.en: Pass me the blue pillow quickly.
translations.de: Reich mir schnell das blaue Kissen.
translations.zh-Hans: 快把蓝色的枕头递给我。
translations.yue: 快啲將藍色嗰個枕頭畀我。
translations.pt: Passa o travesseiro azul rápido para mim.
translations.he: תעביר לי מהר את הכרית הכחולה.
translations.vi: Đưa tôi cái gối màu xanh nhanh lên.
translations.nl: Geef me snel het blauwe kussen.
translations.hu: Gyorsan add ide a kék párnát.
translations.hi: नीला तकिया जल्दी से मुझे दे।
translations.el: Δώσε μου γρήγορα το μπλε μαξιλάρι.
translations.nb: Gi meg den blå puten fort.
translations.sv: Ge mig den blå kudden snabbt.
translations.da: Ræk mig hurtigt den blå pude.
translations.fi: Anna minulle nopeasti se sininen tyyny.

tokens.explanation: Main verb in imperative (2nd person singular); directive.
Tonic pronoun used as clitic complement after the imperative (indirect object).
Adverb of manner modifying the imperative.
Definite article le elided before vowel; introduces oreiller.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of Passe.
Adjective, masculine singular; modifies oreiller.

sentences.target: On doit laver les taies d'oreiller.

translations.fr: On doit laver les taies d'oreiller.
translations.en: We have to wash the pillowcases.
translations.es: Tenemos que lavar las fundas de almohada.
translations.it: Dobbiamo lavare le federe dei cuscini.
translations.pt: A gente precisa lavar as fronhas.
translations.he: אנחנו צריכים לכבס את ציפיות הכריות.
translations.vi: Chúng ta phải giặt vỏ gối.
translations.hi: हमें तकिए के खोल धोने हैं।
translations.ro: Trebuie să spălăm fețele de pernă.
translations.ja: 枕カバーを洗わないといけない。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun functioning as subject.
Modal auxiliary (3rd person singular present) expressing obligation.
Main verb in the infinitive; complement of the modal doit.
Definite article, plural; introduces taies.
Common noun, plural; direct object of laver.
Preposition de elided before vowel; introduces a noun complement.
Common noun; head of the complement d'oreiller specifying the type of taies.

Ton oreiller est trop dur pour moi.
On doit laver les taies d'oreiller.

Your pillow is too hard for me.
Pass me the blue pillow quickly.
We have to wash the pillowcases.
